location: A random (2%) drop from axe-wielding Messmer Soldiers. The most commonly recommended farm is a pair of axe-wielders guarding a tent southwest of Castle Front grace, just outside Castle Ensis.
tactics: From Castle Front grace, head southeast past the wooden barricades to find two axe-wielding soldiers guarding a tent; a Beast-Repellent Torch helps if patrol dogs join in
Not a guaranteed drop — rest at Castle Front to respawn the soldiers and repeat, or equip the Silver Scarab talisman for +75 Item Discovery
Messmer Soldiers carrying spears or swords look similar at a distance — check the weapon silhouette before committing to a specific enemy
The same enemy and drop chance appear across most other DLC regions (Cerulean Coast, Scadu Altus, Abyssal Woods, Charo's Hidden Grave, Ancient Ruins of Rauh) if you'd rather farm elsewhere
lore: A plain, worn steel axe standard-issued to Messmer's rank-and-file soldiers — mass-produced gear favored by troops who gave themselves over completely to their lord's war.

builds.name: Str/Dex quality (charge-attack)
builds.why: D/D scaling with a noticeably higher charged heavy-attack motion value than standard axes, rewarding a build built around charged heavies
